title: YouTube Video ffu35g45G3o
summary_title: Liquid banking on Hyperliquid: borrowing against assets without selling
summary_description: Hyperbeat's non-custodial smart accounts let you spend via card against collateral, earning yield while you hold. 8,000+ users across 30 days.

key_moments.label: 800 joined Hyperliquid via Hyperfun telegram bot during OG community phase
Liquid banking explained: unified on-chain account for trading, spending, saving, credit
Card operates in two modes: cash mode (spend stablecoins) and credit mode (borrow against collateral)
Credit borrowing is non-taxable: hold assets, borrow against them, avoid selling triggers
Target markets: Hyperliquid traders first, then underbanked populations in Africa, Asia, South America
World Cup fantasy football campaign: $150k prize pool, 4,000 players, 5% cashback in Hype
Four revenue pillars: interchange fees, stablecoin yield, trading revenue, credit interest
Hearts token TGE delayed until sustainable revenue scales to drive token value

pull_quote: This is how the rich gets richer, but in most cases it's not available to ordinary people. So that's what we've built.
